exercises.analysis: beautiful 是形容词，后面直接跟主谓 the sunset is，用 How 引导感叹句。How + adj + 主谓！
interesting 以元音开头，book 是可数名词单数，用 What an 引导感叹句。What + an + adj + n + 主谓！

exercises.stem: ___ in the classroom! The students are having a test.
exercises.analysis: 学生正在考试，需要制止说话，用否定祈使句 Don't talk。

exercises.stem: In an exclamation beginning with 'What', the word what is always followed by a noun.
exercises.analysis: What 引导的感叹句中，What 后面必须接名词短语（a/an + adj + n 或 adj + n）。如果后面是形容词或副词，则用 How。
weather 是不可数名词，用 What + adj + n + 主谓！祈使句否定用 Don't + 动词原形。

exercises.question: 将下列句子改为感叹句：The children are very happy today.
exercises.referenceAnswer: How happy the children are today! / What happy children they are today!
scoringPoints: 正确使用 How + adj + 主谓 结构
或正确使用 What + adj + n + 主谓 结构
